calcofi4db 2.8.0

  • Changelog

Sync local files to GCS archive (deprecated wrapper)

Source: R/archive.R
sync_to_gcs_archive.Rd

Creates a new timestamped archive in GCS from local files. This is a convenience wrapper around sync_to_gcs(archive = TRUE).

Usage

sync_to_gcs_archive(
  dir_csv,
  provider,
  dataset,
  gcs_bucket = "calcofi-files-public",
  archive_prefix = "archive",
  force = FALSE
)

Arguments

dir_csv

Local directory containing CSV files

provider

Data provider

dataset

Dataset name

gcs_bucket

GCS bucket name

archive_prefix

Archive folder prefix

force

Force creation even if files match latest archive

Value

List with archive_timestamp, archive_path, created_new, files_uploaded.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# preferred: use sync_to_gcs() directly
sync_to_gcs(
  local_dir  = "/path/to/csv",
  gcs_prefix = "archive",
  bucket     = "calcofi-files-public",
  archive    = TRUE,
  provider   = "swfsc",
  dataset    = "ichthyo")

# legacy wrapper (still works)
sync_to_gcs_archive(
  dir_csv  = "/path/to/csv",
  provider = "swfsc",
  dataset  = "ichthyo")
} # }
